name: Droid Guier
short_description: Droid Guier — an intense robotic combat game! Control a powerful android, face hordes of enemies, complete strategic missions, set explosive mines, and experience nonstop action through stages filled with challenges and foes with unique abilities.
detailed_description:
Droid Guier is an intense robot battle where players control a powerful android and use a variety of weapons to destroy enemies. Strategy is key — use your weapons wisely to avoid being left defenseless!
As you progress, you’ll unlock new attack and defense weapons and create traps to ambush opponents.

The game also features an unlockable weapon shop, where players can buy equipment using gold screws collected throughout the stages.

With fluid gameplay, dynamic combat, and addictive defense mechanics, Droid Guier delivers a thrilling sense of achievement with every victory. Face 47 stages packed with enemies, obstacles, and puzzles — some optional, offering valuable rewards for those who solve them.

Show your skill and record your best score!

The main Droid has access to a wide range of weapons and abilities to defeat enemies:

  • Fire cannon bullets to destroy opponents;

  • Set explosive mines to trap and corner enemies;

  • Use energy reflectors to obliterate nearby robots;

  • Push boxes and mines to control the battlefield;

  • Activate turbo mode for extra speed and agility;

  • Deploy protective shields to block incoming attacks.

The Droid can also collect various items during gameplay:

  • Gold screws, used to purchase and upgrade weapons;

  • Breakable boxes, containing hidden items and bonuses;

  • Timed supply crates, dropping during battles to aid in combat.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
